title: Hornet Removal in Floral Park, Long Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Floral Park, Long Island. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Floral Park homes and businesses.
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Floral Park homeowners and businesses, with aggressive colonies often nesting in attics, eaves, and trees throughout this charming Long Island village. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services designed to eliminate nests and protect your property from these dangerous stinging insects. Our experienced technicians serve all of Floral Park, from historic homes near Centennial Gardens to properties along Tulip Avenue and Jericho Turnpike.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Floral Park and the surrounding Long Island communities for years, with licensed technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Nassau County neighborhoods. We offer same-day emergency service, safe removal techniques that protect your family and pets, and guaranteed results at competitive prices ranging from $350 to $550.
localContext: Floral Park's tree-lined streets, beautiful gardens, and mix of vintage Tudor and Colonial homes create ideal nesting sites for hornets, particularly during the warm months when activity around Belmont Park and local parks increases. The village's mature landscaping and proximity to wooded areas make professional hornet removal essential for maintaining safe outdoor spaces throughout the community.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Floral Park. Once you contact us, we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours to assess and remove the nest safely. For urgent situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas, we prioritize immediate response to protect your family and neighbors.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal services range from $350 to $550 depending on several factors including nest location (ground level vs. high eaves or trees), nest size, accessibility, and the number of hornets present. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work, with no hidden fees for Floral Park residents.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use proven, EPA-approved methods that effectively eliminate hornet nests while prioritizing the safety of your family, pets, and property. We wear protective gear, establish safe perimeters during treatment, and provide clear instructions for re-entry. We're experienced working around Floral Park's close-knit neighborhoods and take extra precautions accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your hornet removal service in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If hornets return to the same nest location within 30 days of treatment, we'll return at no additional charge to re-treat the area. We also provide prevention tips specific to Floral Park properties to help minimize future hornet activity around your home or business.
